sections.title: Course Enrollment
sections.subtitle: A conversation about enrolling in an evening course

questions.question: Student name: _______
questions.explanation: The student's name is Lisa Park.|学生名字是Lisa Park。

questions.question: Course name: _______ Photography
questions.explanation: She wants to enroll in Digital Photography.|她想报读数码摄影课程。

questions.question: Course code: PH_______
questions.explanation: The course code is PH204.|课程代码是PH204。

questions.question: Start date: _______ September
questions.explanation: The course starts on 12 September.|课程从9月12日开始。

questions.question: What level is the course?
questions.explanation: She enrolls in the intermediate level.|她报名中级班。

questions.question: Course fee: £_______
questions.explanation: The fee is 180 pounds.|费用是180英镑。

questions.question: Duration: _______ weeks
questions.explanation: The course runs for 8 weeks.|课程为期8周。

questions.question: Time: 6:30 PM - _______ PM
questions.explanation: The class runs from 6:30 to 8:30 PM.|课程从下午6:30到8:30。

questions.question: What equipment does she need to bring?
questions.explanation: She needs to bring her own camera.|她需要自带相机。

questions.question: Payment method: _______
questions.explanation: She pays by credit card.|她用信用卡支付。
